title: Baby Comforter for Newborns | Soft Giraffe Comforter Blanket Toy | Newborn Essentials and Giraffe Blanket Gift | New Baby Boy or Girl Gift Idea | Eco Friendly | 30x30cm
features: Perfect Gift For Newborns – A thoughtful baby present for new baby boys or girls. Ideal for baby showers or new mums, this joyful giraffe comforter baby gift is a soft, safe, and adorable keepsake. Award finalist – Progressive Preschool Best Gift Range 2023

Soft Plush Blanket Toy – Made from ultra-soft plush, this baby giraffe blanket gently self-soothes and comforts babies and toddlers. Perfect for cuddling during nap time or playtime, this will likely become baby’s favourite companion
Eco-Friendly – Made from 100% recycled plush material. A sustainable option for environmentally conscious parents looking for a cute giraffe blanket or comforter
Baby Safe – Designed in the UK, our high quality cuddly giraffe comforter blankets are made to rigorous safety requirements (adhere to the EN71 safety standard) that you would expect for baby toys

Supports Baby Sensory Development – Ideal size for tiny hands to hold, the silky taggies support early sensory play, and keep little ones calm. A charming giraffe comforter choice for baby boys or girls
